page.title: Jet Ski Rental Nerja | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book jet ski rental Nerja from €749/2h. Depart Puerto Banús on a Sea-Doo GTX. Includes skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks. WhatsApp for availability.
data.summary: Jet ski rental Nerja is available from Boat Rental Marbella with a Sea-Doo GTX. Depart Puerto Banús for a 2-hour session at €749, including skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, 3.4m long, seats up to 3 passengers.
Pricing from €749 for 2 hours (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, VAT included).
Fuel, insurance, and safety equipment included.
Soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks provided.
21% Spanish IVA included in all prices.
Book via WhatsApp for availability and custom durations.

faq.q: Can I ride a jet ski in Nerja without a license?
faq.a: Yes. Our Sea-Doo GTX rental includes a licensed skipper who handles the jet ski. You can sit as a passenger and enjoy the ride without any boating license. All safety equipment is provided.

faq.q: How much does jet ski rental in Nerja cost?
faq.a: Our jet ski rental starts at €749 for 2 hours, departing from Puerto Banús. This includes a skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT. Longer durations are available on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the jet ski?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX accommodates up to 3 passengers, including the skipper. This is ideal for small groups or families wanting a shared experience.

faq.q: Do you offer jet ski rental in Nerja for longer than 2 hours?
faq.a: Yes. While our standard jet ski rental is 2 hours, you can arrange longer sessions by contacting us via WhatsApp. We customise durations based on availability.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: The price covers a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and 21% Spanish VAT. No hidden fees.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski depart from?
faq.a: All our charters, including jet ski rentals, depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. This is about 80 km from Nerja, a scenic drive along the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: Can I drive the jet ski myself?
faq.a: Our jet ski rental includes a skipper, so you ride as a passenger. This ensures safety and compliance with local regulations. If you prefer a self-drive option, please inquire via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski in Nerja?
faq.a: Book via WhatsApp. Provide your preferred date, time, and duration. We confirm availability and send booking details. Payment is usually on the day.

data.body_html:
Jet ski rental in Nerja offers an exhilarating way to explore the Costa del Sol coastline. At Boat Rental Marbella, we provide a premium Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, departing from Puerto Banús, just a short drive from Nerja. Our 2-hour session costs €749, including a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and all taxes. Whether you're seeking a thrilling ride or a scenic coastal tour, this experience combines speed with comfort.

Why Choose Our Jet Ski Rental in Nerja?

Our Sea-Doo GTX is a 3.4-metre jet ski designed for stability and performance. It seats up to three passengers, making it perfect for couples, friends, or small families. Every rental includes a professional skipper, so no license is required. We cover fuel, insurance, safety gear, and refreshments—soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. The 21% Spanish VAT is already included in the price, so what you see is what you pay.

Pricing and Duration

Our standard jet ski rental is 2 hours at €749. For longer sessions, contact us via WhatsApp to arrange custom durations. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and VAT. There are no hidden costs.

What to Expect on Your Jet Ski Adventure

Depart from Puerto Banús and cruise along the Marbella coastline. Your skipper will navigate past landmarks like the Golden Mile, La Concha mountain, and the exclusive villas of Río Verde. Depending on conditions, you may head towards Cabopino or Estepona. The jet ski’s powerful engine delivers an exciting ride, while the comfortable seating ensures a smooth experience. Safety briefings and life jackets are provided before departure.

How to Get to Puerto Banús from Nerja

Nerja is approximately 80 km east of Marbella. Drive via the A-7 motorway (about 50 minutes) or take a direct bus from Nerja to Marbella bus station, then a short taxi to Puerto Banús. We recommend arriving 15 minutes before your booking to complete paperwork and meet your skipper.

Other Boats Available for Nerja Trips

If you prefer a larger vessel, we offer a fleet of motor yachts and catamarans departing from Puerto Banús. Options include the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax, from €749/2h) and the Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax, from €749/2h). For a premium experience, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax, from €4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski. Browse our full fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella hub.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I ride a jet ski in Nerja without a license?

Yes. Our Sea-Doo GTX rental includes a licensed skipper who handles the jet ski. You can sit as a passenger and enjoy the ride without any boating license. All safety equipment is provided.

How much does jet ski rental in Nerja cost?

Our jet ski rental starts at €749 for 2 hours, departing from Puerto Banús. This includes a skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT. Longer durations are available on request via WhatsApp.

How many people can ride on the jet ski?

The Sea-Doo GTX accommodates up to 3 passengers, including the skipper. This is ideal for small groups or families wanting a shared experience.

Do you offer jet ski rental in Nerja for longer than 2 hours?

Yes. While our standard jet ski rental is 2 hours, you can arrange longer sessions by contacting us via WhatsApp. We customise durations based on availability.

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

The price covers a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, safety equipment, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, and 21% Spanish VAT. No hidden fees.

Where does the jet ski depart from?

All our charters, including jet ski rentals, depart from Puerto Banús in Marbella. This is about 80 km from Nerja, a scenic drive along the Costa del Sol.

Can I drive the jet ski myself?

Our jet ski rental includes a skipper, so you ride as a passenger. This ensures safety and compliance with local regulations. If you prefer a self-drive option, please inquire via WhatsApp.

How do I book a jet ski in Nerja?

Book via WhatsApp. Provide your preferred date, time, and duration. We confirm availability and send booking details. Payment is usually on the day.
